edits.rationale: Equipment ID 2847.420.0018 has been superseded by 2847.420.0019 in v2.
edits.old_text: This instruction applies to all operators and maintenance personnel responsible for the Vertical Turning Lathe (Asset ID: 2847.310.0061) and the Hydraulic Press, 12-ton (Asset ID: 2847.420.0018). Compliance with this Work Instruction is mandatory to prevent Nonconformance Reports (NCR) and ensure adherence to AIQS 2.2.3.
edits.new_text: This instruction applies to all operators and maintenance personnel responsible for the Vertical Turning Lathe (Asset ID: 2847.310.0061) and the Hydraulic Press, 12-ton (Asset ID: 2847.420.0019). Compliance with this Work Instruction is mandatory to prevent Nonconformance Reports (NCR) and ensure adherence to AIQS 2.2.3.
